title: Bethune-Cookman University Town Hall

title: Bethune-Cookman University Town Hall
body: Thank you Roland for hosting this town hall and giving a voice to all those who have been silenced for so long. I hope the best for BCU 🙏🏽🥰
author: @jeanineunscripted

title: Bethune-Cookman University Town Hall
body: This is a really great town hall. I hope other HBCUs are paying attention. Thank you Roland Martin. Black media at its finest. I hope this opens conversation and transparency between administration, students & parents and I hope they get things upgraded and fixed for these students.
author: @JustRaine97

title: Bethune-Cookman University Town Hall
body: I am so proud of Roland Martin Unfiltered.  I'm rejoining RMU .  Thank you Mr Martin for all you do.  This was humbling, enlightening, uplifting conversation. Just WOW!
author: @glendabhoward5570

title: Bethune-Cookman University Town Hall
body: Dr. Crite was wonderful! He was out in the student population everyday, he stood in lines and waited his turn, he ate lunch in the cafe and shook hands with the staff and students. Yes, they ran him off because he "wanted to know too much." He demanded excellence and change, the board didn't want that. They wanted someone to play their game.
author: @divinelyfeminine2612

title: Bethune-Cookman University Town Hall
body: Thank you Roland for getting everyone in one room to get on the same page. We’re so much stronger together!!
author: @cjd9978

title: Bethune-Cookman University Town Hall
body: Roland Martin 🤩💜 you are just awesome 👍🏾 I hope things work out and the students get what they deserve... Good night 🌃🙏🏾🙏🙏🏽🙏🏿

title: Bethune-Cookman University Town Hall

title: Bethune-Cookman University Town Hall
body: This alumni panel is more about protecting these students than what is being presented by the president and board of trustees.   Don’t give up on these young adults.

title: Bethune-Cookman University Town Hall
body: Thanks Dr. Roland for being proactive and continuing the focus on the issues at BCU and any HBCU where there are allegations of administrative failure and malfeasance...The students must always come first and you cannot say we are saving our kids from the ghetto and then exposing them to a "ghetto" environment due to administrative incompetence, mismanagement and corruption...

title: Bethune-Cookman University Town Hall
body: This college needs a Board of Trustees that really give a damn and they need a President that is not in it for the money for his or herself

title: BETHUNE- COOKMAN UNIVERSITY CAMPUS DORM TOUR! | Part 1 | Showing All Dorms Available on campus! 💛

title: BETHUNE- COOKMAN UNIVERSITY CAMPUS DORM TOUR! | Part 1 | Showing All Dorms Available on campus! 💛
body: Dang it’s so much different from when I was there. Bronson Hall and Annex, and Lefevre were boy dorms. Jaflo, Joyner, Curtis and Meigs were all girl dorms. LLC was co-ed. Lee Rhyant and Phase 2 weren’t even thought of then lol
author: @TrevorBattle

title: BETHUNE- COOKMAN UNIVERSITY CAMPUS DORM TOUR! | Part 1 | Showing All Dorms Available on campus! 💛

author: @daysims4054

title: BETHUNE- COOKMAN UNIVERSITY CAMPUS DORM TOUR! | Part 1 | Showing All Dorms Available on campus! 💛
body: Huh not too much has changed with Bronson Hall/Annex, retiling expected with the old style for the community bathrooms. Probably knocked out the closet areas that separated the Halls room and they stacked with 4 to a dorm. Some guys went bunk beds to conserve room. Not sure why the beds are elevated but probably making up for the lack storage space to share.

title: RAW & REAL... My Trip To Bethune Cookman University | OFFSCRIPT LIVE
body: Security is one of the things Ed spoke about as he stated the homeless come through the campus all the time. Ed said they were mad about his music but they need to see what the kids are wearing, but still security should be better.

title: RAW & REAL... My Trip To Bethune Cookman University | OFFSCRIPT LIVE
body: Thanks for being the first to pull up and report, that was real journalism Off Script. You gave a fair assessment and talked about achievable things wanted by the students. Those kids are not asking for much. Living in those types of conditions will make them use to bullshit. When you pay your hard earned money for a hotel or restaurant you should expect quality. This is college and it could be better if you have people with a vision on the board .
author: @TheCut2009

title: RAW & REAL... My Trip To Bethune Cookman University | OFFSCRIPT LIVE
body: Mannnn....I can hug you right now. Alums have been saying this for years. We will not be silenced...no more #newjackcity

body: Great work keeping the conversation going around BC! Hopefully it sparks some change. I really do hope Roland Martin finds a venue and has his town hall, cause shining the light is the fastest way to change.

title: RAW & REAL... My Trip To Bethune Cookman University | OFFSCRIPT LIVE
body: The students accepting those conditions as young adults will not prepare them for how to expect the best for themselves and for others. Nothing gets done because your vote is guaranteed and no one has to work for it.
author: @garysmith9015

title: RAW & REAL... My Trip To Bethune Cookman University | OFFSCRIPT LIVE
body: I’m so pissed that our own people turn a blind eye for the $. These kids deserve better for what they paid for 31k a year for each student. Man come on get security for them kids.

body: I’m from Columbia SC and Claflin is a great school. I chose Benedict and really think I should have chosen Claflin.
author: @thaddeussmith8394

title: RAW & REAL... My Trip To Bethune Cookman University | OFFSCRIPT LIVE
body: I've researched much of this situation....  The best question is where is the money going.... If you look at the financials of the school it will tell you the full story.... Also, fill in the gaps with why the board doesn't present itself.. Lastly, all of the COVID funding forwarded by the Fed. Govt... almost an additional $68Mil... Appears that an audit is in order..... Get there financials... See who is getting paid what and track the money... Watch how many people will immediately resign.... Maintenance, Safety, Food.. These are college basics and to witness the lack of these as priorities to Faculty and Staff should tell another story.... I am the voice of reason....
author: @WinkRanson

title: RAW & REAL... My Trip To Bethune Cookman University | OFFSCRIPT LIVE
body: The more you reported the more I excused Ed Reed for his bluntness. What's worse is the pompous, smug attitude I perceived the BC president having during his interview last week, was verified.  You know I don't always rock with you because I think you're unfair with your criticisms of JSU, but I have to give you props for going to the source and seeing for yourself. This is good reporting. 💯

title: RAW & REAL... My Trip To Bethune Cookman University | OFFSCRIPT LIVE
body: Credits don't always transfer from college to college. The kids need to make sure they take classes that aren't a waste. Because if it has significant value, you can provide the syllabus from the course to the school you're transferring to for review.

title: RAW & REAL... My Trip To Bethune Cookman University | OFFSCRIPT LIVE
body: The primary white van is not affiliated with the school. It was a private shuttle that had been in operation for 20 years transporting students. The second white van, can’t tell you.

title: Bethune Cookman Experience || Tuition & Fees
body: Thank you discussing the tuition fees. Nobody on Youtube talks about the tuition fees. I even visited BCU Wildcat Day and they mentioned everything else but tuition, dorms, and meal plan because they know the cost will scare students away. Why didn't you transfer during the spring?
author: @taishajulie

title: Bethune Cookman Experience || Tuition & Fees
body: Woww thank you so much for this advice I was thinking about that and I’m only a junior whew nvm I ain’t goin there
author: @traceyvictor

title: Bethune Cookman Experience || Tuition & Fees
body: So currently I’m a junior, and really wanted to go to Bethune for music. So should I reconsider it ?
author: @myaa.camille

title: Bethune Cookman Experience || Tuition & Fees
body: 23 to 28 🤷🏽‍♂️🤦🏽‍♂️.. When I came in it was like 19k. I came in 2007 when they first changed to a university... Paying for band is trash.. I played in the band so I didn't pay a lot my scholarship almost covered everything.. When going to HBCU's play a instrument or try to play sports please.. Dorms been trash since then.. I stayed in Bronson (old Bronson) and the rooms were super small smh.. They were building new Bronson as we called it my first year. Do Not get a meal plan!!! Buy a griddle and go to Walmart every 2 weeks!! 👍🏽  I'm still stuck on the band payment it makes no sense.. Boosters and sponsors pay for a lot of band stuff and symphonic band makes money so I'm confused 🤷🏽‍♂️🤦🏽‍♂️.. I love cookman! that walk down MLK TO BETHUNE GRILL for those honey wings and homemade pink lemonade was clutch.. But just make sure you get scholarships because they will always go up in scholarships! Good Luck!
author: @Trap323a

title: Bethune Cookman Experience || Tuition & Fees
body: Hey girl I need to connect with you because I just got accepted into this school and it is one of my choices, and the only thing that's stopping me is the money situation and what should I do?? And I honestly don't want to go to a community college because I have my reasons. So now I just feel stuck. I would love to connect with you on social media

title: Bethune Cookman Experience || Tuition & Fees
body: So how much did you pay in total this year? Also if you arent in band or any of the activities they have you paying for do you get that money back in the refund?

title: HBCU Homecoming Vlog | Greek Step Show, Tailgate, Parties, & More! | Bethune Cookman University

title: HBCU Homecoming Vlog | Greek Step Show, Tailgate, Parties, & More! | Bethune Cookman University
body: That station Buc-cees is a trip !  I was heading back from Nola to Tallahassee we stopped inder, I couldn't stop spending 💰!!! I couldn't get out of there!!  Kennedy you came up in Nola?  I have a spot inda byewater OFFA St Claude and Poland Ave, I also was in the VI at that same restaurant at that time. Crazy I stayed there for months in Frenchman's cove. You are very mature and down to earth for your age I like the way you carry your originality. You aren't no follower and if anything are a leader in control.  I gotta some rentals on da beach deep south Costa Rica in Pavones called Good Times. Find it on Google maps maybe y'all wanna come kick it on avatar some time I promise it's mind blowing. ✌🏿
author: @mattdereuiter2442

title: BETHUNE-COOKMAN UNIVERSITY CAMPUS TOUR! (THE REAL DEAL)
body: This is the most helpful one yet out of all the BCU tours it’s the most detailed and showed stuff I haven’t even seen

title: BETHUNE-COOKMAN UNIVERSITY CAMPUS TOUR! (THE REAL DEAL)
body: Thank you for this even though I’m still going to need a tour 😂 but at least I know what these buildings are for
author: @adrianmikel

title: BETHUNE-COOKMAN UNIVERSITY CAMPUS TOUR! (THE REAL DEAL)
body: Thank you, Kiana for a tour of the Bethune-Cookman University campus.  I enjoyed the tour.  I attended the college back in the 80's.  Your tour brought back so much great memories.  I was a part of the Concert Chorale Choir lead by Dr. Steele.  As a freshman, I was in Le Fevre Hall.  I later moved to the Brunson Hall (all male).  The Brunson was all male that consisted of the band, choir, and football players. Again, thank you so much for the tour.  Take care.
author: @Zianzio123

title: BETHUNE-COOKMAN UNIVERSITY CAMPUS TOUR! (THE REAL DEAL)
body: Wow! I didn't know that Mary McLeod Bethune was buried on the campus. That's cool. Also, it’s cool the respect you showed her by not recording it. 💪🏾♥️♥️
author: @snobbypolitics7792

title: BETHUNE-COOKMAN UNIVERSITY CAMPUS TOUR! (THE REAL DEAL)
body: Hail Wildcats!  Curtis Hall and Meigs Hall are old building that need to be used. Ja-FLo is old too. I worked in the library it looks the same. i still see the campus is extremely beautiful each year that I returned. Homecoming 2019 was great being on the yard .
author: @deborahbattle8026

Watch the Roland Martin show interviews….these issues need to be investigated and remedied for these kids..😢😢😢😢
